title: carduus horridulus
intro: Carduus horridulus, also known as the prickly thistle, is a plant species native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its distinctive thorny stem and purple flowers. The medicinal properties of Carduus horridulus lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and improve liver function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to alleviate digestive problems, lower blood pressure, and even have anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Carduus horridulus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
